title: Sixty-one new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta October 8–14
summary: During the week of October 8–14, YKHC reports 61 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 61 residents are in: Akiachak, 1 Alakanuk, 6 Aniak , 4 Bethel, 4 Chevak, 3 Crooked Creek, 1 Eek, 5 Emmonak, 3 Grayling, 1 Kalskag, 3 Kasigluk, 2 Kipnuk, 3 Kwethluk, 4 Kwigillingok, 2 Lower...

title: The Arctic Institute Reacts to the new U.S. National Strategy for the Arctic
summary: The Arctic Institute comments on the 2022 U.S. National Strategy for the Arctic Region, published in October 2022. The post The Arctic Institute Reacts to the new U.S. National Strategy for the Arctic appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
